subject: refactor(pwa): extract IconCacheDisclosure + harden a11y
body:
Extract the "Already installed and the icon looks outdated?" disclosure
from InstallInstructionsModal into its own component. Same visual +
behaviour contract as before; the split isolates the a11y/state concerns
for testing and future reuse.

a11y hardening from the a11y trigger pass:
- py-2 + hitSlop 8/8/4/4 gives a ~44pt effective touch target (was
  ~20pt with py-1, below Apple HIG and WCAG 2.5.5 AAA recommendation).
- accessibilityElementsHidden + importantForAccessibility on the caret
  icon — accessibilityLabel on the parent button carries the meaning,
  so SRs shouldn't read "caret-right" after the label.

Tags: refactor, pwa, a11y
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
title: extract IconCacheDisclosure + harden a11y
